sprint.name: Sprint 001
sprint.goal: Deliver a complete end-to-end communication coaching experience.
focus: Keep the practice → coach → reflect loop reliable
Raise coaching quality and founder confidence in Forge
Operate Atlas as the founder control center

todayMission.title: Stabilize the founder control loop
todayMission.detail: Ship Atlas Phase 3 executive dashboard, prove notes + daily brief, keep the practice loop green.

milestone.title: MVP coaching loop live on Supabase
milestone.detail: Guests can practice, get coached, reflect, and persist progress in the cloud.

deployment.message: Main is shipping Atlas Founder OS + Supabase MVP persistence.

priorities.title: Protect the communication loop
priorities.detail: Guest → mission → coaching → reflection → progress must stay green.

priorities.title: Improve coaching quality
priorities.detail: Make Forge feedback sharper, warmer, and more actionable.

priorities.title: Increase stability
priorities.detail: Reduce silent failures across continue, persist, and reflect.

priorities.title: Improve user experience
priorities.detail: Polish the practice surface without expanding scope.

bugs.title: Supabase Auth not connected
bugs.detail: Guest identity uses a browser session pointer. Real auth is still deferred.

bugs.title: UI polish incomplete
bugs.detail: Practice and progress surfaces still need visual refinement.

aiCost.note: Heuristic estimate until OpenAI usage billing is wired.

quickActions.label: Continue Building
quickActions.description: Jump back into the product loop
